Milton Public Library
Your browser has javascript disabled. Without javascript some functions will not work.
Book your Institution & Museum passes here.
Boston Children's Museum Admits up to 4 (adults or children) at half price per person. After receiving a library discount pass, you must reserve a visit online with Boston Children’s Museum. Due to safety measures, walk-ins are not allowed. Museum capacity is limited at this time. Patrons must first acquire a dated library discount pass. Then visit https://www.bostonchildrensmuseum.org/ticketing Review the...
Boston Harbor Islands (seasonal) Half-priced ferry tickets to the Boston Harbor Islands national park areas for up to 4 people. After booking this library pass, follow the instructions in your confirmation email to book a ferry reservation. The code can be used to purchase discounted tickets to Spectacle Island, Georges Island and Peddocks Island. Please refer to the Ferry Schedule at:...
Institute of Contemporary Art Library passes admit 2 people at $10 per person. 1. Patrons must first acquire a valid digital library pass at their participating library to receive this discount. 2. Purchase tickets online: https://www.icaboston.org/
Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum The discount offers half-price off General Admission for up to 4 visitors. Any additional tickets will be normally priced (Children under 18 are always free and should be reserved as child tickets) This library pass does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum. If you have any issues reserving your tickets, you can call the Gardner Museum's Box Office at 617 278 5156. PATRONS MUST...
Maplewood Country Day Camp & Enrichment Center Admits up to 2 children for $12 each. Not valid on Saturdays. Valid for either a Morning (9:30 am-12:00 pm) or an Afternoon session (1:30 - 5:00 pm) To use the facility you must complete an online waiver. Click here Maplewood Indoor/outdoor playground is open during school-year months for children 6 years old and younger. All children must be accompanied by an adult. No charge for...
Museum of Fine Arts The Museum is open Wednesday through Monday. Each pass now allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $14. Children 6 and under are free.
Museum of Science This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free. You do not need to call ahead to reserve a timed ticket. If you have questions or prefer to reserve in advance, you can call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
New England Aquarium This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium. Only applies to adult and child pricing. This is not a ticket. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people. Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and...
Paul Revere Heritage Site Each pass admits 2 people at 50$ off regular admission. Special events are not included. The pass is a physical coupon and you need to pick it up at the Milton Public Library before going to the museum. PLEASE BRING YOUR CONFIRMATION EMAIL TO THE MPL TO PICK UP YOUR PASS BEFORE GOING TO THE MUSEUM.
Zoo New England Each pass admits 6 people. Adults are $9 per person and children are $6 per person. The pass is good for either the Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo. The pass is a physical coupon and you need to pick it up at the Milton Public Library before going to the zoo. PLEASE BRING YOUR CONFIRMATION EMAIL TO THE MPL TO PICK UP YOUR PASS BEFORE GOING TO THE ZOO
